# 🖥️ NixOS System Configurations

Welcome to my repository of NixOS system configuration files, tailored for all my machines! This project is organized for clarity, scalability, and reusability.

✨ Features
<details> <summary>Click to expand features</summary>

    Modular configurations for multiple hosts.
    Reproducible system setups using Nix Flakes.
    Host-specific and shared configurations.
    Scalable structure for adding new machines.
    Automatic updates for dependencies via flake.lock.

</details>

📜 Usage

    Clone this repository:

git clone https://github.com/username/nixos-config.git

Choose the desired host configuration:

    nixos-rebuild switch --flake .#desktop
